device_description.example: The Pulnovo PADN system is intended for the treatment of pulmonary arterial hypertension.

evidence_statement.pattern: Based on the available [data/evidence/literature], [N] studies were identified that [criteria].

non_equivalence.pattern: Equivalence is not claimed for the device under evaluation.
non_equivalence.frequency: 1/5 (heart-lung machine — novel device, no comparable product)
non_equivalence.example: The device represents a novel technology for which no equivalent device has been identified on the market.

evidence_rules.ifu_not_absolute: IFU is a source document, not final truth. It can be calibrated by evidence, RMF, and claim alignment.
evidence_rules.sota_benchmark_reasoning: Every benchmark must show: evidence source → quantitative data → benchmark value → claim linkage.
evidence_rules.claim_evidence_alignment: Claims, IFU, RMF, GSPR, and clinical evidence must have traceable alignment.
evidence_rules.pmid_requirement: Every quantitative claim must cite a real PMID from the evidence registry.
evidence_rules.evidence_ceiling_transparency: Explicitly state whether evidence is from title/abstract (MODERATE) or full-text (STRONG).

quality_gates.zero_placeholders: No [To be completed] or TBD anywhere in document
quality_gates.gmdn_consistency: GMDN code (61810) consistent across all tables and sections
